headline: PNC Raises Common Stock Dividend to $2.00 Per Share
summary: The board of directors of The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) declared a quarterly cash dividend on the common stock of $2.00 per share, an increase of $0.30 per share, or 18%, from the second quarter dividend of $1.70 per share. The dividend will be payable Aug. 5, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business July 20, 2026.

headline: PNC Financial: Premium Valuation Leads To 'Hold' Recommendation Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
summary: PNC Financial is a Hold, citing solid earnings and NIM growth post-FirstBank, but premium valuation and a 2.7% yield cap upside. Click for more on PNC stock.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on PNC Financial Services Gr, Raises Price Target to $264.5
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Vivek Juneja   maintains PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $238 to $264.5.
